response.justification: Maria Rodriguez demonstrates strong full-stack development experience and a focus on geospatial data through GISCollective, but her primary expertise lies in Node.js, TypeScript, and Dlang rather than modern C++/Rust required for routing tiling. Her geospatial background is relevant but not directly aligned with high-performance routing pipeline development or real-time traffic integration.
strengths: Proven geospatial platform experience (GISCollective) with open-source contributions
Strong background in distributed systems and low-latency applications
Excellent problem-solving approach with TDD and CI/CD practices
concerns: Limited modern C++/Rust experience (primary requirement for the role)
Most recent work focuses on Node.js/TypeScript rather than routing-specific technologies
Geospatial experience is in mapping applications rather than routing data pipelines
